//: Worker config. convexUrl may be left empty — the worker falls back to VITE_CONVEX_URL in ../.env.local (written by `npx convex dev`). Override any field in config.local.json (gitignored) or via env (PRR_CONVEX_URL, CLAUDE_BIN, PRR_CLONE_DIR). The watch list is NOT here anymore — repos are managed in the dashboard (Convex `watchedRepos`); the worker subscribes to it. Each review clones the repo into a temp dir under cloneDir (default OS temp) and deletes it after, so no per-repo checkout is needed.
